content: Adaptive replan UX: users abandon AI coaches that make large structural plan changes after a single bad or missed workout. Athletica.ai principle: recalculate intelligently not aggressively. Key distinction: micro-adjustments (tomorrow's session targets) vs macro-restructuring (moving phase boundaries, week count). Macro changes should require 2-3 data signals, not 1. Always explain the reason before showing the changed plan. Plan instability metric: if >30% of sessions shift by >2 days in a replan, the algorithm is too aggressive.
